summary: Implemented ADR 0249 from an isolated latest-origin/main worktree by generating repo-managed Prometheus blackbox HTTPS/TLS targets and alert rules from the shared service catalogs, replaying the monitoring stack to deploy those files on monitoring-lv3, verifying 31 active https-tls-blackbox targets plus 93 loaded https_tls_assurance rules, and recording branch-local testssl.sh receipts that showed the 60-second timeout budget outperformed a 120-second experiment.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml pytest -q tests/test_https_tls_assurance_windmill_wrapper.py tests/test_https_tls_assurance_targets.py tests/test_monitoring_vm_role.py tests/test_guest_observability_role.py tests/test_guest_log_shipping_playbook.py tests/test_loki_log_agent_role.py` returned `19 passed in 0.36s`, and `python3 -m py_compile scripts/https_tls_assurance.py config/windmill/scripts/https-tls-assurance.py` succeeded.

verification.check: Generated HTTPS/TLS artifacts and monitoring automation
verification.observed: `make validate-generated-https-tls-assurance`, `make syntax-check-monitoring`, `./scripts/validate_repo.sh alert-rules agent-standards`, and `make preflight WORKFLOW=converge-monitoring` all passed before the live replay.

`make converge-monitoring` completed successfully with final recap `backup-lv3 ok=14 changed=0 failed=0`, `coolify-lv3 ok=15 changed=7 failed=0`, `docker-build-lv3 ok=47 changed=2 failed=0`, `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=70 changed=2 failed=0`, `monitoring-lv3 ok=379 changed=6 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=150 changed=4 failed=0`, `postgres-lv3 ok=38 changed=0 failed=0`, and `proxmox-host ok=100 changed=3 failed=0`.

SSH verification through the Proxmox jump path confirmed active services `influxdb`, `grafana-server`, `loki`, `alloy`, `tempo`, `otelcol-contrib`, `lv3-prometheus`, `prometheus-alertmanager`, and `prometheus-blackbox-exporter`; `/etc/prometheus/file_sd/https-tls-targets.yml` and `/etc/prometheus/rules/https-tls-alerts.yml` existed on `monitoring-lv3`; the Prometheus API reported 31 active `https-tls-blackbox` targets; and rule group `https_tls_assurance` loaded 93 rules.

The 60-second production replay receipt `20260328T231106Z` completed in `1563.47` seconds with 16 medium `tls.scan_timeout` findings and no high or critical findings, while the 120-second experiment receipt `20260328T233840Z` took `3429.13` seconds with 26 medium `tls.scan_timeout` findings and no high or critical findings, so the branch kept the 60-second default.

notes: The branch-local live apply was completed before the final exact-main integration so protected release-track files could remain untouched on the isolated workstream branch.

During this branch-local workstream, origin/main advanced beyond repo version 0.177.54; the final merge-to-main step must refresh the ADR metadata, release state, and canonical receipt IDs against the latest mainline before pushing to origin/main.
